scripts.eslint: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared eslint && yarn --cwd ./packages/components eslint && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk eslint
scripts.eslint:ci: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared eslint:ci && yarn --cwd ./packages/components eslint:ci && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk eslint:ci
scripts.prettier: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared prettier && yarn --cwd ./packages/components prettier && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk prettier
scripts.prettier:ci: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared prettier:ci && yarn --cwd ./packages/components prettier:ci && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk prettier:ci
scripts.typescript: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared typescript && yarn --cwd ./packages/components typescript && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk typescript
scripts.typescript:ci: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared typescript:ci && yarn --cwd ./packages/components typescript:ci && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk typescript:ci
scripts.prepare: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared prepare && yarn --cwd ./packages/components prepare && yarn husky:install && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk prepare && yarn husky:install
scripts.release:major: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared changelog -- -M && yarn --cwd ./packages/components changelog -- -M && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk changelog -- -M && yarn bumpAndPublish
scripts.release:minor: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared changelog -- -m && yarn --cwd ./packages/components changelog -- -m && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk changelog -- -m && yarn bumpAndPublish
scripts.release:patch: yarn --cwd ./packages/shared changelog -- -p && yarn --cwd ./packages/components changelog -- -p && yarn --cwd ./packages/sdk changelog -- -p && yarn bumpAndPublish
scripts.bumpAndPublish: yarn prettier && git add . && git commit -m 'docs: update CHANGELOG files' && lerna publish --no-private
